judgment_calls.phrase_match_result: Content 'don't invent issues' does not match canonical semantic phrases (accurate, appropriate, reasonable, matches the spirit of) but expresses a semantic constraint that cannot be expressed as a Python predicate.
judgment_calls.rationale: Whether the output 'invents' issues requires understanding of what constitutes a real finding vs a fabricated one — a semantic judgment that requires an LLM to evaluate, not a structural count or regex check.
